forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,55 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KPG5YB7GTQ6Q3CEQAMXPJ58F
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: e280
+title: 'Commands: paste handler ‚Äî column onto board'
+---
+## What
+
+Implement `ColumnIntoBoardHandler` ‚Äî duplicates a column into a target board. Handler at `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/paste_handlers/column_into_board.rs`, matches `("column", "board")`.
+
+### Action
+
+1. Parse board id from target moniker.
+2. Clone `clipboard.fields` (column's `name`, `order`, any styling).
+3. Drop the source `order` ‚Äî new column is appended at the end (highest order + 1) unless a later product decision changes this.
+4. Invoke `AddEntity::new("column").with_overrides(fields)`.
+5. Do NOT copy the column's tasks ‚Äî this handler duplicates the column structure only. Task duplication is a separate concern.
+6. If `clipboard.is_cut`, delete the source column via `DeleteColumn::new(&clipboard.entity_id)`.
+
+### Files
+
+- CREATE `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/paste_handlers/column_into_board.rs`.
+- MODIFY `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/paste_handlers/mod.rs` ‚Äî register call.
+
+### Subtasks
+
+- [ ] Implement `ColumnIntoBoardHandler`.
+- [ ] Register.
+- [ ] Colocate tests.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- [ ] Handler matches `("column", "board")`.
+- [ ] Pasting a column onto a board creates a new column with the source's name/fields appended to the board.
+- [ ] Tasks in the source column are NOT duplicated.
+- [ ] Cut variant deletes the source column after create.
+
+## Tests
+
+- [ ] `paste_column_into_board_creates_column` ‚Äî source "Doing" column; paste onto board; new "Doing" column exists.
+- [ ] `paste_column_into_board_does_not_copy_tasks` ‚Äî source column has 3 tasks; new column has 0.
+- [ ] `paste_column_appended_at_end` ‚Äî new column's order is greater than all existing columns'.
+- [ ] `paste_cut_column_deletes_source`.
+- [ ] Run command: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban paste_handlers::column_into_board` ‚Äî all green.
+
+## Workflow
+
+- Use `/tdd`.
+
+#commands
+
+Depends on: 01KPG5YB7GTQ6Q3CEQAMXPJ58F (mechanism)
\ No newline at end of file

changes.value: Commands: paste handler ‚Äî column onto board

## What

Implement `ColumnIntoBoardHandler` ‚Äî duplicates a column into a target board. Handler at `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/paste_handlers/column_into_board.rs`, matches `("column", "board")`.

### Action

1. Parse board id from target moniker.
2. Clone `clipboard.fields` (column's `name`, `order`, any styling).
3. Drop the source `order` ‚Äî new column is appended at the end (highest order + 1) unless a later product decision changes this.
4. Invoke `AddEntity::new("column").with_overrides(fields)`.
5. Do NOT copy the column's tasks ‚Äî this handler duplicates the column structure only. Task duplication is a separate concern.
6. If `clipboard.is_cut`, delete the source column via `DeleteColumn::new(&clipboard.entity_id)`.

### Files

- CREATE `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/paste_handlers/column_into_board.rs`.
- MODIFY `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/paste_handlers/mod.rs` ‚Äî register call.

### Subtasks

- [ ] Implement `ColumnIntoBoardHandler`.
- [ ] Register.
- [ ] Colocate tests.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Handler matches `("column", "board")`.
- [ ] Pasting a column onto a board creates a new column with the source's name/fields appended to the board.
- [ ] Tasks in the source column are NOT duplicated.
- [ ] Cut variant deletes the source column after create.

## Tests

- [ ] `paste_column_into_board_creates_column` ‚Äî source "Doing" column; paste onto board; new "Doing" column exists.
- [ ] `paste_column_into_board_does_not_copy_tasks` ‚Äî source column has 3 tasks; new column has 0.
- [ ] `paste_column_appended_at_end` ‚Äî new column's order is greater than all existing columns'.
- [ ] `paste_cut_column_deletes_source`.
- [ ] Run command: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban paste_handlers::column_into_board` ‚Äî all green.

## Workflow

- Use `/tdd`.

#commands

Depends on: 01KPG5YB7GTQ6Q3CEQAMXPJ58F (mechanism)
